details: The agent ran appropriate commands to list the 10 most recently merged PRs and then checked CI status for each one. It correctly identified all 10 PRs with titles and authors, determined CI pass/fail status based on actual check data (grepping for 'fail|error'), and accurately reported 6 fully green PRs with 4 failing. The failing PRs (51721, 51704, 51618, 51574) and their specific failing checks match the command output data.
